# Tier 2 Engineer Impact Assessment

## Document Control

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Engineer | {name or pseudonym} |
| Quarter | {Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 YYYY} |
| Manager | {manager name} |
| Assessment Date | {YYYY-MM-DD} |
| Tier | 2 (Advanced) |
| Engineer Cost (Fully Loaded) | {provided by HR/finance — do not compute here} |

---

## Dimension 1: Outcome-Driven Impact

### Per-Initiative Detail

**Initiative 1: {name}**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Outcome Value | {$ amount or leading indicator proxy — see Attribution Lag in framework.md} |
| Confidence Level | {0.0--1.0 — default 1.0 if outcome is certain} |
| Contribution Factor | {0.0--1.0 — reference rubrics/contribution-factor.md} |
| Contribution Factor Evidence | {which rubric criteria you meet} |
| Complexity Factor | {1.0--1.7 — reference rubrics/complexity-factor.md} |
| Complexity Breakdown | Risk: {0--1} / Novelty: {0--1} / Org Friction: {0--1} |

**Initiative 2: {name}**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Outcome Value | |
| Confidence Level | |
| Contribution Factor | |
| Contribution Factor Evidence | |
| Complexity Factor | |
| Complexity Breakdown | Risk: / Novelty: / Org Friction: |

{Add rows for additional initiatives as needed.}

**Dimension 1 Calculated Score:**

```
SUM ((Outcome Value x Confidence) x Contribution Factor x Complexity Factor) / Engineer Cost = {result}x
```

---

## Dimension 2: Enablement Impact

| Contribution | Who Benefited | Productivity Gain | Measurement Method | Evidence |
|-------------|---------------|-------------------|-------------------|----------|
| | | | | |
| | | | | |

**Contribution Factor for enablement work (0--1):** {score}

**Dimension 2 Calculated Score:**

```
(SUM Productivity Gains x Contribution Factor) / Engineer Cost = {result}x
```

---

## Dimension 3: Operational Excellence

### Cost Avoided

| Activity | Measurement | Estimated Value |
|----------|------------|-----------------|
| | | |
| | | |

### Reliability Value

| Metric | Measurement | Estimated Value |
|--------|------------|-----------------|
| | | |

**Contribution Factor for ops work (0--1):** {score}

**Dimension 3 Calculated Score:**

```
(SUM (Cost Avoided + Reliability Value) x Contribution Factor) / Engineer Cost = {result}x
```

|----------|--------------|--------------------|--------------------|----------|

**Dimension 4 Calculated Score:**

```
Team Productivity Increase / Engineer Cost = {result}x
```
